title: Is Cortisol Behind Your Hormonal Symptoms After 40? Here Is What to Know
seo_title: Cortisol and Hormonal Symptoms After 40: What to Know
meta_description: Learn how cortisol hormones after 40 drive belly fat, anxiety, poor sleep, and thyroid issues, and what to do to restore balance naturally.
tags: cortisol, stress, hormones, women over 40, adrenal fatigue, magnesium, HPA axis, anxiety

excerpt: Cortisol dysregulation is one of the most overlooked drivers of hormonal symptoms in women over 40. Learn how elevated cortisol affects belly fat, sleep, mood, and thyroid function, and how to reset it naturally.
